title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 07 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 07 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 07 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, The main contract I2409 closed at 886.5. an decreaseof 0.06% throughout the day; The enthusiasm of traders for shipping is still acceptable. Some steel mills have a demand for post holiday restocking and purchase as needed.
